docs.title: MusicApps Knowledge Base
docs.text: This is the technical reference for the MusicApps project — a personal knowledge base documenting the architecture, tools, and concepts behind building SessionClick and future apps.

docs.title: What's in here
docs.text:
• Kotlin Multiplatform — how KMP works, what Gradle does, how Kotlin code ends up running on iOS
  • Android & iOS — concepts and terminology compared side by side
  • Tools — AI agents, development tools, and workflows used in this project
